footer.tagline: Safely transporting adopted dogs across Europe.
footer.copyright: Lilia Paws Travel. Made with ❤️ for dogs.

hero.title: Every dog deserves a
hero.subtitle: Safely transporting adopted dogs across Europe — connecting shelters with loving families, one paw at a time.

about.title: Born from a love for rescue dogs
about.p1: Lilia Paws Travel was founded in 2018 by Lilia Kovacs, a passionate animal welfare advocate who recognized a critical gap — thousands of dogs were being adopted across borders with no safe, reliable transport.
about.p2: From a one-van operation to a network spanning 18 countries and 200+ shelters, we've safely transported over 1,200 dogs and counting.

safetyFirst.title: Safety First
safetyFirst.desc: Vet-approved health certificates and constant monitoring.

weCare.title: We Care Deeply
weCare.desc: Dogs are not cargo. Comfort stops and cuddles on every trip.

fullyLegal.title: Fully Legal
fullyLegal.desc: EU pet travel compliance — microchips, passports, documents handled.

shelterPartners.title: Shelter Partners
shelterPartners.desc: We work with 200+ certified shelters and verified adopters.

step4.title: Safe Delivery
step4.desc: Your dog arrives happy and healthy.

cta.title: Ready to bring your dog home?
cta.subtitle: Submit a transport request and we'll respond within 24 hours.

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you

tripRequest.title: Book a Transport
tripRequest.subtitle: Select a travel date, fill in your details, add your dogs, and submit.
tripRequest.clickHint: Click a highlighted date to select a trip.
tripRequest.tripFullMsg: This trip is fully booked. Please select another date.
tripRequest.requestsClosedMsg: Requests for this trip are currently closed.
tripRequest.noTripHint: Select a highlighted date on the calendar above to start your booking.
